calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Heather Ingle Gernhardt Re Cslb Licensure In Support Of Application For Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 585(D)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for application for default judgment pursuant to CCP Section 585(D).

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:45:53 p.m. and concluding at 03:13:17 p.m.

Plaintiff William Cabezas appearing represented by Heather Ingle Gernhardt, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Katherine Cabezas represented by Heather Ingle Gernhardt, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Robert De La Cruz not appearing.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing, including the Complaint for Breach of Contract; Violation of Statute-Business & Professions Code Section 7000 Et. Seq.; Restitution - Based on Unjust Enrichment; and Common Count - Money Had and Received filed Aug-05-2022. Court finds the following:

1. Operative Pleading is the Complaint filed Aug-05-2022
2. Default was entered as to Defendant on Oct-18-2022
3. Defendant was served with Complaint on Aug-17-2022
4. DOES 1-20 were DISMISSED on Jan-17-2023

Court examines Plaintiff's Counsel regarding any offset for work that was completed, its second cause of action, and Business & Professions Code Section 7000 as it relates to this action.

The matter is submitted.
Court is satisfied with Plaintiff's documentation and finds Plaintiff has proven allegations in its complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs William Cabezas and Katherine Cabezas, and against Robert De La Cruz, as follows:

1. Damages: $112,840.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $15,212.64
3. Attorney Fees: $6,635.00
4. Costs: $1,243.98

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $135,931.62

Proposed judgment signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2023 Continued To Sep-06-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Declaration Of Heather Ingle Gernhardt Re Cslb Licensure In Support Of Application For Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 585(D)
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To Jul-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for application for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Court Reporter: Gina Minnis, CSR #11996; 408-313-8720; gina.csr@gmail.com

Plaintiff William Cabezas represented by Heather Ingle, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Robert De La Cruz not appearing.

WILLIAM CABEZAS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court confirms damages being sought by Plaintiff and examines Plaintiff's Counsel regarding its attorney fees declaration.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. A - Letter to Robert De La Cruz dated Mar-15-2022 from William Cabezas with Spreadsheet of Summary of Payments

Court determines that Statement of Damages were not served on Defendant but Plaintiff's Complaint outlines damages sought.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline, summary of case, and an offer of proof.
WILLIAM CABEZAS is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

Court requires additional evidence to support Plaintiff's demand.
Court orders matter continued to Jul-19-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 for hearing.

COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING:

1. Plaintiff shall file and serve Statement of Damages and Memorandum of Costs.
2. Plaintiff shall file Supplemental Declaration justifying its demand.
3. Planitiff's Counsel shall file a Declaration regarding Attorney Fees itemizing its hourly rate and time spent on this case.
4. Plaintiff shall file a proof of service for all filings.

Court is not inclined to award pre-judgment interest and relys on Civil Code of Procedure Sections 3287 and 3289.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Continued To Jun-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2022 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
